description_long: This is a military-style, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined, dark green fuselage and a glass-enclosed cockpit positioned near the front. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, featuring visible support struts and ailerons, and the tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers in a conventional layout. The landing gear is fixed, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the engine cowling is clearly defined. The surface of the airplane is mostly smooth with some panel lines and rivet details visible, and the paint scheme includes military markings. The overall design suggests a World War II-era fighter or reconnaissance aircraft.
description: A dark green, single-propeller military airplane with a glass cockpit, mid-mounted straight wings, and fixed landing gear. The fuselage is streamlined with visible panel lines and military markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, glass cockpit, and symmetrical wing structure with visible landing gear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, cockpit canopy, and tail section with military markings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the fixed landing gear.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the propeller, cockpit, and the full length of the fuselage and wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings, supported by struts, no winglets, and minimal dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy integrated into the fuselage.
